titleStmt.title: SII 26.590: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 590.

summary.p: On a slab in front of the Āñjanēya temple.

p.hi: Śaka 1674, Prajōtpatti, Mārgaśira śu. 2 = 1751 A.D., November 9 (Saturday).

summary.p: It records the consecration of the deity of Hanumān in the village Chiṁttapalli by Āvula (Veṁkkaṭa) ramaṇappa Tirapati, son of Yallappa, grandson of Pōtana belonging to Chaṁḍilla-gōtra, who made a gift of land as sarvamānya for worship, food-offerings, etc., in the same made over to Āñjanēya a devotee of god Janārdanasvāmi of Chintapalli.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śa
ka va¨rṣaṁbulu 1674
Agunēṭi prajōtpattinā
ma saṁ ... mā¨rgaśira śu . 2 lu . śrī
madakhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁ
ḍanāyakulaina ciṁttapalli śrī
janā¨rdanasvāmi bhaktuḍaina śrīĀṁ
janēyulaku caṁḍilla gōtrōdbhavulu
nnu pōtanagāri pautṛlunnu yallappagāri pu
tṛluṁnnu Āvula veṁkkaṭaramaṇappa tirapa
tigāru sama¨rppiṁccina dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ . ciṁttapa
lligrāmamaṁdu dda kippiṁci ha
numānula nūtana pratiṣṭhacēyiṁcci nitya
naivēdya dīpārādhana kaiṁkaryānaku ṇaṁ pā
ni ku ṁ . cēnu sarvamānyaṁgānū
sama¨rppaṇa cēyiṁstimi ganuka yī kaiṁkka
ryamu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu voppa
na gonanu vadaliṁcavalenū ...
dānapālanayō¨rmadhyē dānācchrēyō
nupālanaṁ . dānātsva¨rga mavāpnō
ti pālanā dacyutaṁ padaṁ ... śrī
śrī śrīṁ jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 26.590 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
